title: MCP Tool Registry Sync + Workplan Dashboard Visibility
description: MCP tool definitions are now decoupled to config/mcp-tools.json. This workplan syncs them into SpacetimeDB on nexus startup (ADR-044 pattern) and adds workplan execution visibility to the project dashboard.

phases.name: SpacetimeDB MCP Tool Table + Sync
phases.description: Create a SpacetimeDB table for MCP tool definitions and sync from config/mcp-tools.json on nexus startup.

tasks.name: Add mcp_tool table to hexflo-coordination WASM module
tasks.description: Add a new SpacetimeDB table `mcp_tool` with fields: name (String, primary_key), category (String), description (String), route_method (String), route_path (String), input_schema (String as JSON), version (String), synced_at (String). Add a reducer `mcp_tool_sync(name, category, description, route_method, route_path, input_schema, version)` that upserts the tool definition.

tasks.name: Add tool sync to nexus config_sync on startup
tasks.description: In hex-nexus config_sync, read config/mcp-tools.json and call the mcp_tool_sync reducer for each tool. This follows the ADR-044 pattern: repo files are source of truth, SpacetimeDB is distribution. Add a sync_mcp_tools() function that loads the JSON, iterates tools, and calls the reducer via the SpacetimeDB client.

tasks.name: Add REST endpoint for tool registry
tasks.description: GET /api/tools — returns all registered MCP tools from SpacetimeDB (or from config/mcp-tools.json as fallback). Useful for dashboard and external clients to discover available tools.

phases.name: Dashboard Workplan View
phases.description: Add workplan execution visibility to the hex-nexus dashboard. Shows active/historical workplan executions with phase progress, agent assignments, and gate results.

tasks.name: Create workplan data store
tasks.description: Create hex-nexus/assets/src/stores/workplan.ts — a Solid.js store that fetches workplan data from GET /api/workplan/list and GET /api/workplan/{id}/report. Polls every 5s when a workplan is active. Exports: workplans() signal with list, activeWorkplan() for current execution, and fetchReport(id) action.

tasks.name: Create WorkplanView component
tasks.description: Create hex-nexus/assets/src/components/views/WorkplanView.tsx — the main workplan dashboard view. Shows: (1) Active execution banner with phase progress bar, (2) Execution history table (id, feature, status, phases completed/total, duration, agents), (3) Expandable detail panel for selected execution showing phase breakdown, gate results, and git commits. Use existing dashboard CSS variables and table patterns from AgentFleet.tsx.

tasks.name: Wire WorkplanView into dashboard router
tasks.description: Add 'Workplans' nav item to the dashboard sidebar/navigation. Wire the WorkplanView component into the router so it's accessible at the /workplans path. Add a workplan status indicator to the project detail view showing active execution count.
